TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == I-sa-pey-la-i-se " kamu nu Si-pang-ya, Isabel I la Cat√≥lica, 1451 a bulad 22 a demiad-1504 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 26 a demiad" nu Kaa-ti-ya-wang-kow atu Ley-ang-wang-kow tatayna a hungti. ciniza atu acawa u sabama tu ci Pey-ti-nan-al-se malaheci tu ku niala tu malahedaway a lala' a undu, paayaw tu aenengan nu baki nu heni ci Ca-li-u-semapulung tu Si-pang-ya-ti-kow. zuma miedap tu Ke-li-s-to-bu.Ke-lun-pu apatadas tu Mey-cow-Sin-ta-lu, sakay patadas palahad tu satipan a kitakit patahkal tu satabakiay a nipaini. zuma miawza micukaymas ciniza ci ba-lan-si-s-ke.Si-mey-ney-s.te.si-s-ney-low-s-su-ci saicelang sa pacakat tu sakuwan nu hungti a mipenec tu makatalay nu kakitaan, ngay sakuwan nu hungti au "kiwkay nu misaybangan mutesek tayza tu nikauzip nu binawlan, ngay tademaw amin mala miduducay mitengilay tu kiwkay, atu nu hungti a lumaan. micalukay tu hungti 1454 a mihcaan ci I-sa-pey-la-I-se a wama ci Ka-s-ti-ya-wang-kow hungyi ci Bu-an-al-se mapatay hawsa, u lecad a wama padek a wayna a kakama ci En-li-ke-se-se micaluk tu hungti. 1469 a mihca 10 a buladd 19 a demiad u teked niza atu pacici sabama a calekakaan ci Ya-la-kang-wang-kowu nitucekan malahungti ci Pay-ti-nan-al-se malacingki. 1474 a mihcaan, En-li-ke-se-se mapatay, cacay ku tataynaan awaw ci Bu-an-na, En-li-ke-se-se mapatuzu' nu situngusa kakitaan u "maliyuhay matatakis cayay ka siwawa" ci Bu-an-na u kanamuhan niza atu padek a tatamaan awaw nu hungti a acawa. ci I-sa-pey-la-I-se kalamlam sa amicaluk tu hungti. ci Bu-an-na1475 a mihcaan mikadabu tu ci Pu-taw-ya hungti ci A-bung-su-u-se. 1474ŚĻī, . A-bung-su-u-se namahiza kesemsa musakamu huntu ci Bu-an-na ku micalukay tu hungti, nika 1476 a mihcaan i To-low a hita mahamin mademez. A-bung-su-u-se mapacici misulit a matatelek tu A-al-ka-su-wa, miales tu sakay Ka-ti-ya-wang-kow a hungti tu hamin a salunguc. 1478 a mihcaan ci I-sa-pey-la-1-se i tinsikiw a kiwkayan pihangan patizeng tu Si-pang-ya kiwkay nu pisaybangan, misawacu, tu cayay ku tisikiw a tademaw saicelang sa mipacakat tu hungti a sakuwan. . 1479 a mihcaan ci Pe-la-kang" a wama mapatay, ci pey-ti-nan-al-se atu ci I-sa-pey-la-1-se mala Ya-la-kang atu Ka-s-ti-ya wang-kow a hungti,tatayna a hungti. 180 a mihcaan uyni malaacawaay mitakus palecapu tu tapang atu 34 ku dayhiw nu tademaw panutek tu kasa hulic, saka ayaw nu Si-pang-ya paketun nu angangan a hulic. I-sa-pey-la-1-se kala congtungan hina takus matatengil ngangan u "Ka-s-ti-ya huing" a pitatengilan nu kanatal, asaca zuma a sakuwan akawaw hamin pabelien "ci Ka-s-ti-ya wang kow a katatengilan". ci Ka-s-ti-ya-wang-kow a katatengilan a tademaw u hungti ku sitatudungay, u micuzukay tu teked u cen-ce ku kawaw tu siicelangay baluhay a sadikec. ciniza atu tatanengay a kakitaay mapulung mipaculi tu kakitaan, u i niyazu'ay tademaw a hitay u zikuzan siicelangay nu hitay mikawaw, nu kasumamadan cacay ka buhat a kakitaanay tut ulu sakaput a hitay patudud aw acawa calkaka a sabama ci Pay-ti-nan-al-se "ya-la-kang" ku mikuwanay, mipenec, mipalasawad tu kakitaan sapatalaw tu kawaw nu hitay. ciniza sakay kawaw nu pahabayay tu sizi tawki anisakaputan tu "Ma-s-ta" kong-huy caay pikuwan, zayhan cen-hu sapiala tu sata angangan makayzaay mikawaway tu pahabanay tu sizi, mahiniay a kawaw ayaw lalid katukuh Sin-ta-lu a zaysang yadah ku nipacumud i Si-pang-ya. 1492 a mihca 1 a bulad 2 a demiad, I-sa-pey-la-1-se atu ci Pey-ti-nan-al-se a hita milais tu mikuwanay tu I-pi-li a kasasubal tu nju timula pitu lasubu a mihcaanay a Mu-al a tademaw tu sazikuzay cacay miliyaway aziyazu' ci Ke-la-na-ta, malaheci I-pi-li-ta kasasubal a ciwlu u icelang tu sakay I-s-lan-cyaw u icelang pinaay a lasubu a mihcaan ku pilalais miala tu malapesay alala' a undu. I-sa-pey-la-1-se zikuz namapatay u tataynaan a wawa ci Bu-an-na ku micalukay, acawa ni Bu-an-na, namakayzaay i Ha-pu-s-paw-wang-caw ci Bey-li-pu-1-se zikuz i kapatayan ni I-sa-pey-la-1-se atu ci Pey-ti-nan-2-se masasulacus, nika ayaw nu labu a kalalais mapatay. ci Bey-li-pu-1-se "Ka-s-ti-ya" a tatamaan a wawa ci Ca-I 2 se "Sen-senLow-ma-ti-kow" mala Si-pang-ya nu micalukay tu hungti, mikuwan tu Si-pang-ya-ti-kow katukuh kaicelangen ku nu ayzaay.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-i-s…ô " kamu nu si-paŇč-ja, isab…ôr~…ĺ i r~…ĺa ¶at*r~…ĺi ¶a, **** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" nu kaa-ti-ja-waŇč-kow atu r~…ĺ…ô-aŇč-waŇč-kow tatajna a ńßuŇčti. ¶iniza atu a ¶awa u sabama tu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu ku niar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺańß…ôdawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a undu, paajaw tu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu baki nu ńß…ôni ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-u-s…ômapur~…ĺuŇč tu si-paŇč-ja-ti-kow. zuma mi…ôdap tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-to-bu.k…ô-r~…ĺun-pu apatadas tu m…ô- ¶ow-sin-ta-r~…ĺu, sakaj patadas par~…ĺańßad tu satipan a kitakit patańßkar~…ĺ tu satabakiaj a nipaini. zuma miawza mi ¶ukajmas ¶iniza ¶i ba-r~…ĺan-si-s-k…ô.si-m…ô-n…ô-s.t…ô.si-s-n…ô-r~…ĺow-s-su- ¶i sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa pa ¶akat tu sakuwan nu ńßuŇčti a mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu makatar~…ĺaj nu kakitaan, Ňčaj sakuwan nu ńßuŇčti au "kiwkaj nu misajbaŇčan mut…ôs…ôk tajza tu nikauzip nu binawr~…ĺan, Ňčaj tad…ômaw amin mar~…ĺa midudu ¶aj mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj tu kiwkaj, atu nu ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺumaan. mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-i-s…ô a wama ¶i ka-s-ti-ja-waŇč-kow ńßuŇčji ¶i bu-an-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mapataj ńßawsa, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a wama pad…ôk a wajna a kakama ¶i …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺadd ** a d…ômiad u t…ôk…ôd niza atu pa ¶i ¶i sabama a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan ¶i ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč-waŇč-kowu nitu ¶…ôkan mar~…ĺańßuŇčti ¶i paj-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺa ¶iŇčki. **** a mińß ¶aan, …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mapataj, ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan awaw ¶i bu-an-na, …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mapatuzu Ē~ ° nu situŇčusa kakitaan u "mar~…ĺijuńßaj matatakis ¶ajaj ka siwawa" ¶i bu-an-na u kanamuńßan niza atu pad…ôk a tatamaan awaw nu ńßuŇčti a a ¶awa. ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-i-s…ô kar~…ĺamr~…ĺam sa ami ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti. ¶i bu-an-na**** a mińß ¶aan mikadabu tu ¶i pu-taw-ja ńßuŇčti ¶i a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô. *****, . a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô namańßiza k…ôs…ômsa musakamu ńßuntu ¶i bu-an-na ku mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti, nika **** a mińß ¶aan i to-r~…ĺow a ńßita mańßamin mad…ôm…ôz. a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô mapa ¶i ¶i misur~…ĺit a matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk tu a-ar~…ĺ-ka-su-wa, miar~…ĺ…ôs tu sakaj ka-ti-ja-waŇč-kow a ńßuŇčti tu ńßamin a sar~…ĺuŇču ¶. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô i tinsikiw a kiwkajan pińßaŇčan patiz…ôŇč tu si-paŇč-ja kiwkaj nu pisajbaŇčan, misawa ¶u, tu ¶ajaj ku tisikiw a tad…ômaw sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa mipa ¶akat tu ńßuŇčti a sakuwan. . **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-kaŇč" a wama mapataj, ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô atu ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô mar~…ĺa ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč atu ka-s-ti-ja waŇč-kow a ńßuŇčti,tatajna a ńßuŇčti. *** a mińß ¶aan ujni mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj mitakus par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tu tapaŇč atu ** ku dajńßiw nu tad…ômaw panut…ôk tu kasa ńßur~…ĺi ¶, saka ajaw nu si-paŇč-ja pak…ôtun nu aŇčaŇčan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶. i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô kar~…ĺa ¶oŇčtuŇčan ńßina takus matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ŇčaŇčan u "ka-s-ti-ja ńßuiŇč" a pitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ, asa ¶a zuma a sakuwan akawaw ńßamin pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn " ¶i ka-s-ti-ja waŇč kow a katat…ôŇčir~…ĺan". ¶i ka-s-ti-ja-waŇč-kow a katat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a tad…ômaw u ńßuŇčti ku sitatuduŇčaj, u mi ¶uzukaj tu t…ôk…ôd u ¶…ôn- ¶…ô ku kawaw tu sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a sadik…ô ¶. ¶iniza atu tatan…ôŇčaj a kakitaaj mapur~…ĺuŇč mipa ¶ur~…ĺi tu kakitaan, u i nijazu Ē~ °aj tad…ômaw a ńßitaj u zikuzan sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu ńßitaj mikawaw, nu kasumamadan ¶a ¶aj ka buńßat a kakitaanaj tut ur~…ĺu sakaput a ńßitaj patudud aw a ¶awa ¶ar~…ĺkaka a sabama ¶i paj-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô "ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč" ku mikuwanaj, mip…ôn…ô ¶, mipar~…ĺasawad tu kakitaan sapatar~…ĺaw tu kawaw nu ńßitaj. ¶iniza sakaj kawaw nu pańßabajaj tu sizi tawki anisakaputan tu "ma-s-ta" koŇč-ńßuj ¶aaj pikuwan, zajńßan ¶…ôn-ńßu sapiar~…ĺa tu sata aŇčaŇčan makajzaaj mikawawaj tu pańßabanaj tu sizi, mańßiniaj a kawaw ajaw r~…ĺar~…ĺid katukuńß sin-ta-r~…ĺu a zajsaŇč jadańß ku nipa ¶umud i si-paŇč-ja. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô atu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô a ńßita mir~…ĺais tu mikuwanaj tu i-pi-r~…ĺi a kasasubar~…ĺ tu nju timur~…ĺa pitu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aanaj a mu-ar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw tu sazikuzaj ¶a ¶aj mir~…ĺijawaj azijazu Ē~ ° ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i i-pi-r~…ĺi-ta kasasubar~…ĺ a ¶iwr~…ĺu u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu sakaj i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pinaaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ku pir~…ĺar~…ĺais miar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺap…ôsaj ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a undu. i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô zikuz namapataj u tatajnaan a wawa ¶i bu-an-na ku mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj, a ¶awa ni bu-an-na, namakajzaaj i ńßa-pu-s-paw-waŇč- ¶aw ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-*-s…ô zikuz i kapatajan ni i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô atu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-*-s…ô masasur~…ĺa ¶us, nika ajaw nu r~…ĺabu a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais mapataj. ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-*-s…ô "ka-s-ti-ja" a tatamaan a wawa ¶i ¶a-i * s…ô "s…ôn-s…ônr~…ĺow-ma-ti-kow" mar~…ĺa si-paŇč-ja nu mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti, mikuwan tu si-paŇč-ja-ti-kow katukuńß kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ku nu ajzaaj.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == I-sa-pey-la-i-se " kamu nu Si-pang-ya, Isabel I la Cat√≥lica, 1451 a bulad 22 a demiad-1504 a mihcaan 11 a bulad 26 a demiad" nu Kaa-ti-ya-wang-kow atu Ley-ang-wang-kow tatayna a hungti. ciniza atu acawa u sabama tu ci Pey-ti-nan-al-se malaheci tu ku niala tu malahedaway a lala' a undu, paayaw tu aenengan nu baki nu heni ci Ca-li-u-semapulung tu Si-pang-ya-ti-kow. zuma miedap tu Ke-li-s-to-bu.Ke-lun-pu apatadas tu Mey-cow-Sin-ta-lu, sakay patadas palahad tu satipan a kitakit patahkal tu satabakiay a nipaini. zuma miawza micukaymas ciniza ci ba-lan-si-s-ke.Si-mey-ney-s.te.si-s-ney-low-s-su-ci saicelang sa pacakat tu sakuwan nu hungti a mipenec tu makatalay nu kakitaan, ngay sakuwan nu hungti au "kiwkay nu misaybangan mutesek tayza tu nikauzip nu binawlan, ngay tademaw amin mala miduducay mitengilay tu kiwkay, atu nu hungti a lumaan. micalukay tu hungti 1454 a mihcaan ci I-sa-pey-la-I-se a wama ci Ka-s-ti-ya-wang-kow hungyi ci Bu-an-al-se mapatay hawsa, u lecad a wama padek a wayna a kakama ci En-li-ke-se-se micaluk tu hungti. 1469 a mihca 10 a buladd 19 a demiad u teked niza atu pacici sabama a calekakaan ci Ya-la-kang-wang-kowu nitucekan malahungti ci Pay-ti-nan-al-se malacingki. 1474 a mihcaan, En-li-ke-se-se mapatay, cacay ku tataynaan awaw ci Bu-an-na, En-li-ke-se-se mapatuzu' nu situngusa kakitaan u "maliyuhay matatakis cayay ka siwawa" ci Bu-an-na u kanamuhan niza atu padek a tatamaan awaw nu hungti a acawa. ci I-sa-pey-la-I-se kalamlam sa amicaluk tu hungti. ci Bu-an-na1475 a mihcaan mikadabu tu ci Pu-taw-ya hungti ci A-bung-su-u-se. 1474ŚĻī, . A-bung-su-u-se namahiza kesemsa musakamu huntu ci Bu-an-na ku micalukay tu hungti, nika 1476 a mihcaan i To-low a hita mahamin mademez. A-bung-su-u-se mapacici misulit a matatelek tu A-al-ka-su-wa, miales tu sakay Ka-ti-ya-wang-kow a hungti tu hamin a salunguc. 1478 a mihcaan ci I-sa-pey-la-1-se i tinsikiw a kiwkayan pihangan patizeng tu Si-pang-ya kiwkay nu pisaybangan, misawacu, tu cayay ku tisikiw a tademaw saicelang sa mipacakat tu hungti a sakuwan. . 1479 a mihcaan ci Pe-la-kang" a wama mapatay, ci pey-ti-nan-al-se atu ci I-sa-pey-la-1-se mala Ya-la-kang atu Ka-s-ti-ya wang-kow a hungti,tatayna a hungti. 180 a mihcaan uyni malaacawaay mitakus palecapu tu tapang atu 34 ku dayhiw nu tademaw panutek tu kasa hulic, saka ayaw nu Si-pang-ya paketun nu angangan a hulic. I-sa-pey-la-1-se kala congtungan hina takus matatengil ngangan u "Ka-s-ti-ya huing" a pitatengilan nu kanatal, asaca zuma a sakuwan akawaw hamin pabelien "ci Ka-s-ti-ya wang kow a katatengilan". ci Ka-s-ti-ya-wang-kow a katatengilan a tademaw u hungti ku sitatudungay, u micuzukay tu teked u cen-ce ku kawaw tu siicelangay baluhay a sadikec. ciniza atu tatanengay a kakitaay mapulung mipaculi tu kakitaan, u i niyazu'ay tademaw a hitay u zikuzan siicelangay nu hitay mikawaw, nu kasumamadan cacay ka buhat a kakitaanay tut ulu sakaput a hitay patudud aw acawa calkaka a sabama ci Pay-ti-nan-al-se "ya-la-kang" ku mikuwanay, mipenec, mipalasawad tu kakitaan sapatalaw tu kawaw nu hitay. ciniza sakay kawaw nu pahabayay tu sizi tawki anisakaputan tu "Ma-s-ta" kong-huy caay pikuwan, zayhan cen-hu sapiala tu sata angangan makayzaay mikawaway tu pahabanay tu sizi, mahiniay a kawaw ayaw lalid katukuh Sin-ta-lu a zaysang yadah ku nipacumud i Si-pang-ya. 1492 a mihca 1 a bulad 2 a demiad, I-sa-pey-la-1-se atu ci Pey-ti-nan-al-se a hita milais tu mikuwanay tu I-pi-li a kasasubal tu nju timula pitu lasubu a mihcaanay a Mu-al a tademaw tu sazikuzay cacay miliyaway aziyazu' ci Ke-la-na-ta, malaheci I-pi-li-ta kasasubal a ciwlu u icelang tu sakay I-s-lan-cyaw u icelang pinaay a lasubu a mihcaan ku pilalais miala tu malapesay alala' a undu. I-sa-pey-la-1-se zikuz namapatay u tataynaan a wawa ci Bu-an-na ku micalukay, acawa ni Bu-an-na, namakayzaay i Ha-pu-s-paw-wang-caw ci Bey-li-pu-1-se zikuz i kapatayan ni I-sa-pey-la-1-se atu ci Pey-ti-nan-2-se masasulacus, nika ayaw nu labu a kalalais mapatay. ci Bey-li-pu-1-se "Ka-s-ti-ya" a tatamaan a wawa ci Ca-I 2 se "Sen-senLow-ma-ti-kow" mala Si-pang-ya nu micalukay tu hungti, mikuwan tu Si-pang-ya-ti-kow katukuh kaicelangen ku nu ayzaay.

atu r~…ĺ…ô-aŇč-waŇč-kow tatajna a ńßuŇčti. ¶iniza atu a ¶awa u sabama tu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu ku niar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺańß…ôdawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a undu, paajaw tu a…ôn…ôŇčan nu baki nu ńß…ôni ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-u-s…ômapur~…ĺuŇč tu si-paŇč-ja-ti-kow. zuma mi…ôdap tu k…ô-r~…ĺi-s-to-bu.k…ô-r~…ĺun-pu apatadas tu m…ô- ¶ow-sin-ta-r~…ĺu, sakaj patadas par~…ĺańßad tu satipan a kitakit patańßkar~…ĺ tu satabakiaj a nipaini. zuma miawza mi ¶ukajmas ¶iniza ¶i ba-r~…ĺan-si-s-k…ô.si-m…ô-n…ô-s.t…ô.si-s-n…ô-r~…ĺow-s-su- ¶i sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa pa ¶akat tu sakuwan nu ńßuŇčti a mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu makatar~…ĺaj nu kakitaan, Ňčaj sakuwan nu ńßuŇčti au "kiwkaj nu misajbaŇčan mut…ôs…ôk tajza tu nikauzip nu binawr~…ĺan, Ňčaj tad…ômaw amin mar~…ĺa midudu ¶aj mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj tu kiwkaj, atu nu ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺumaan. mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-i-s…ô a wama ¶i ka-s-ti-ja-waŇč-kow ńßuŇčji ¶i bu-an-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mapataj ńßawsa, u r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a wama pad…ôk a wajna a kakama ¶i …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺadd ** a d…ômiad u t…ôk…ôd niza atu pa ¶i ¶i sabama a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan ¶i ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč-waŇč-kowu nitu ¶…ôkan mar~…ĺańßuŇčti ¶i paj-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô mar~…ĺa ¶iŇčki. **** a mińß ¶aan, …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mapataj, ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan awaw ¶i bu-an-na, …ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s…ô-s…ô mapatuzu Ē~ ° nu situŇčusa kakitaan u "mar~…ĺijuńßaj matatakis ¶ajaj ka siwawa" ¶i bu-an-na u kanamuńßan niza atu pad…ôk a tatamaan awaw nu ńßuŇčti a a ¶awa. ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-i-s…ô kar~…ĺamr~…ĺam sa ami ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti. ¶i bu-an-na**** a mińß ¶aan mikadabu tu ¶i pu-taw-ja ńßuŇčti ¶i a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô. *****, . a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô namańßiza k…ôs…ômsa musakamu ńßuntu ¶i bu-an-na ku mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti, nika **** a mińß ¶aan i to-r~…ĺow a ńßita mańßamin mad…ôm…ôz. a-buŇč-su-u-s…ô mapa ¶i ¶i misur~…ĺit a matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk tu a-ar~…ĺ-ka-su-wa, miar~…ĺ…ôs tu sakaj ka-ti-ja-waŇč-kow a ńßuŇčti tu ńßamin a sar~…ĺuŇču ¶. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô i tinsikiw a kiwkajan pińßaŇčan patiz…ôŇč tu si-paŇč-ja kiwkaj nu pisajbaŇčan, misawa ¶u, tu ¶ajaj ku tisikiw a tad…ômaw sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa mipa ¶akat tu ńßuŇčti a sakuwan. . **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i p…ô-r~…ĺa-kaŇč" a wama mapataj, ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô atu ¶i i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô mar~…ĺa ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč atu ka-s-ti-ja waŇč-kow a ńßuŇčti,tatajna a ńßuŇčti. *** a mińß ¶aan ujni mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj mitakus par~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tu tapaŇč atu ** ku dajńßiw nu tad…ômaw panut…ôk tu kasa ńßur~…ĺi ¶, saka ajaw nu si-paŇč-ja pak…ôtun nu aŇčaŇčan a ńßur~…ĺi ¶. i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô kar~…ĺa ¶oŇčtuŇčan ńßina takus matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ŇčaŇčan u "ka-s-ti-ja ńßuiŇč" a pitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ, asa ¶a zuma a sakuwan akawaw ńßamin pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn " ¶i ka-s-ti-ja waŇč kow a katat…ôŇčir~…ĺan". ¶i ka-s-ti-ja-waŇč-kow a katat…ôŇčir~…ĺan a tad…ômaw u ńßuŇčti ku sitatuduŇčaj, u mi ¶uzukaj tu t…ôk…ôd u ¶…ôn- ¶…ô ku kawaw tu sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a sadik…ô ¶. ¶iniza atu tatan…ôŇčaj a kakitaaj mapur~…ĺuŇč mipa ¶ur~…ĺi tu kakitaan, u i nijazu Ē~ °aj tad…ômaw a ńßitaj u zikuzan sii ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu ńßitaj mikawaw, nu kasumamadan ¶a ¶aj ka buńßat a kakitaanaj tut ur~…ĺu sakaput a ńßitaj patudud aw a ¶awa ¶ar~…ĺkaka a sabama ¶i paj-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô "ja-r~…ĺa-kaŇč" ku mikuwanaj, mip…ôn…ô ¶, mipar~…ĺasawad tu kakitaan sapatar~…ĺaw tu kawaw nu ńßitaj. ¶iniza sakaj kawaw nu pańßabajaj tu sizi tawki anisakaputan tu "ma-s-ta" koŇč-ńßuj ¶aaj pikuwan, zajńßan ¶…ôn-ńßu sapiar~…ĺa tu sata aŇčaŇčan makajzaaj mikawawaj tu pańßabanaj tu sizi, mańßiniaj a kawaw ajaw r~…ĺar~…ĺid katukuńß sin-ta-r~…ĺu a zajsaŇč jadańß ku nipa ¶umud i si-paŇč-ja. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô atu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-ar~…ĺ-s…ô a ńßita mir~…ĺais tu mikuwanaj tu i-pi-r~…ĺi a kasasubar~…ĺ tu nju timur~…ĺa pitu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aanaj a mu-ar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw tu sazikuzaj ¶a ¶aj mir~…ĺijawaj azijazu Ē~ ° ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺa-na-ta, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i i-pi-r~…ĺi-ta kasasubar~…ĺ a ¶iwr~…ĺu u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu sakaj i-s-r~…ĺan- ¶jaw u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč pinaaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ku pir~…ĺar~…ĺais miar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺap…ôsaj ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a undu. i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô zikuz namapataj u tatajnaan a wawa ¶i bu-an-na ku mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj, a ¶awa ni bu-an-na, namakajzaaj i ńßa-pu-s-paw-waŇč- ¶aw ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-*-s…ô zikuz i kapatajan ni i-sa-p…ô-r~…ĺa-*-s…ô atu ¶i p…ô-ti-nan-*-s…ô masasur~…ĺa ¶us, nika ajaw nu r~…ĺabu a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais mapataj. ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi-pu-*-s…ô "ka-s-ti-ja" a tatamaan a wawa ¶i ¶a-i * s…ô "s…ôn-s…ônr~…ĺow-ma-ti-kow" mar~…ĺa si-paŇč-ja nu mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu ńßuŇčti, mikuwan tu si-paŇč-ja-ti-kow katukuńß kai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ku nu ajzaaj.
